summary: Testing completed for 6 new features: Driver Achievements, Seller Analytics, Support Tickets Admin, Activity Log Admin, and Chat APIs. All backend APIs passing (22/22 tests). All frontend UIs working correctly.

issues: Push notification modal keeps appearing on every page load. Consider adding 'Don't show again' option or remember user preference

seed_data_creation: Created test support ticket with subject 'TEST_اختبار تذكرة دعم'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 new features tested and working: (1) Driver Achievements - tab visible at /delivery/dashboard, shows 18 achievements with progress bars and category filters (2) Seller Analytics - accessible at /food/dashboard (not /seller/dashboard), shows revenue/order stats with period filters (3) Support Tickets Admin - working at /admin with filters and stats (4) Activity Log Admin - working at /admin with date/action/admin filters (5) Chat APIs - all endpoints returning correct data

driver_achievements.notes: Shows 18 achievements with progress bars, category filters, reward amounts

seller_analytics.notes: Shows revenue, orders, completion rate with period filters (today/week/month/all)

support_tickets_admin.notes: Shows ticket list with status filters and search

activity_log_admin.notes: Shows activity list with action type, admin, and date filters

chat_api.notes: All chat endpoints returning correct data
